parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO s_linkedin.ugc_posts (id, author, content, url, published_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.author.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  '{{ $json.published_at }}',
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET content = EXCLUDED.content, author = EXCLUDED.author
RETURNING id;
